description: Documented Infection Prevention and Control Manual updated per national guidelines.
suggested_documentation: Approved Infection Control Manual, SOP on standard precautions, and hand hygiene policy.

description: Daily room and refrigerator temperature logbook for medication storage areas.
suggested_documentation: Temperature log sheets or digital sensor data export showing twice-daily checks with signature/verification.

description: Valid Fire No Objection Certificate (NOC) issued by the local fire safety department.
suggested_documentation: Original Fire Safety NOC Certificate from local fire department and renewal acknowledgement copy if expired.
